svg.title: DataSense system design diagram
svg.desc: Architecture of the real DataSense agent: input CSVs, FastAPI backend, Gemini LLM with fallback, sandboxed executor, and output files.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the user interact with DataSense?')
sendPrompt('What routes does the FastAPI server expose?')
sendPrompt('How does data_context.py build the dataframe context?')
sendPrompt('What does config.py and the .env file control?')
sendPrompt('How does the agent loop in agent.py work?')
g.text: Iterates up to MAX_AGENT_ITERATIONS · catches GeminiQuotaError

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the local pandas fallback analysis work?')
sendPrompt('How does executor.py sandbox the generated Python code?')
sendPrompt('What gets saved to the output folder?')
sendPrompt('How does the UI display the results?')
